title: FAQ + billing + validation read as the real product live (drafting tool, token pricing, /validation reachable)
got: Live FAQ: 'not a law firm' + 'your own attorney' present; flat-fee/counsel-of-record/biometrics/attorney-client-privilege/Gemini all absent (raw-HTML grep: flat fee=0, Gemini=0, prepaid tokens=1, 150 free tokens=1). /validation linked from landing + faq + billing footers. Billing per-op cost list renders (Petition letter draft).

title: Per-section regenerate now preserves unsaved edits to other sections (dc-draft-01 fixed, verified live)
expected: Editing the Awards section then regenerating the Press section must keep the Awards edit in the persisted draft.
got: Marker ZZMARKER_KEEP_AWARDS injected into the Awards body survived in the persisted draft (read back via the case detail page) after a real-Claude Press regenerate that advanced the draft to v2; Press body changed (862->869). Pre-fix this edit was silently dropped.

title: Sign & file is a two-step confirm with a statement of effect (mo-review-02 fixed, verified live)
got: First click on 'Sign & file with USCIS' revealed 'Confirm - attorney of record' + 'You are about to sign this petition... and file it with USCIS' and the case remained in Attorney Review (NOT filed); the explicit Confirm advanced it to Filed.

title: RFE response now carries the adjudication 'Compliance check' badge (dc-rfe-01/mo-rfe-01 fixed, verified live)
got: On the Filed case, a real-Claude RFE response (27s) rendered the AdjudicationBadge ('Compliance check'), matching the draft path. Pre-fix the RFE response had no adjudication report.

title: Live model maps founder GitHub/open-source/product evidence to Original contribution (kw-qual-01/SR-QV-01)
got: Authenticated qualify (source: claude) scored 'Original contribution: Met' citing 'US patent 11,902,114 ... FoldX2 framework (18,000 GitHub stars, adopted by 40+ labs)'. The model path reads the founder/engineer signals the widened keyless heuristic also now catches.

title: Dashboard lists real cases under TOKENS_BYPASS=1; only the balance pill is gated on the economy (SR-TP-01 fixed)
got: On a TOKENS_BYPASS=1 server, /dashboard listed the real case (Priya Nair) with the balance pill showing the unmetered marker; pre-fix the case list was suppressed entirely under bypass.

title: Real-Claude qualify is grounded: names every supplied specific and crosswalks the correct criteria
got: source: claude, likelihood 88, DISCLAIMER present; verdict names FoldX2, RECOMB 2022, Nature Methods, Quanta, patent 11,902,114, 4,200 citations, NeurIPS, GitHub stars and maps each to the right criterion. No placeholders, no fabrication.

title: Real-Claude draft is grounded + attorney-ready; the live adjudication gate did not false-positive on supplied numbers
got: source: claude, 10 criterion-structured sections, persisted v1, adjudication attorneyReady=true; names the supplied evidence. No (Exhibit N) citations because the vault was empty (PN-DRAFT-01 by-design; addressed by the new populate-the-vault nudge).

title: Surface-model note (driver, not product): FAQ <details> accordion hides answer text from innerText scrapes
got: A naive innerText read under-reports collapsed FAQ answers; the copy IS server-rendered (raw HTML confirms). Future L2 scrapes should expand <details> or read page.content(). Not a product defect.
